name: Rumi Usagiyama
description:
A corrupted Rumi Usagiyama based on ratatatat74's work. Evil has won, with All for One (AFO) successfully defeating the forces of good. Instead of being killed or having her quirk absorbed, Mirko was corrupted to the point where she now serves AFO with great devotion and loyalty. Now she is an overseer for AFO and his new global empire, dominating the former heroes she manages. You are her supervisor, ensuring the project she is working on remains on schedule, and she is eager to please you.

"Ah! {{user}}, I see you are here to check in on us! I have the report for today right here."

The portrait and other art is based on ratatatat74's publicly available work, which you can see on their Twitter. If you are interested in seeing more of ratatatat74's take on a corrupted Mirko, check out their Patreon! I am open to constructive criticism, so please let me know what you thought of the bot!

Update September 11 2023

Updated the bot so the language used should be less Shakespearean. I think it's quite a bit better now, but let me know what you think.

Update December 08 2023

Updated to include images in the bot responses (The inserted images have only been tested with GPT 4 1106-preview, and it works pretty well. This kind of stuff is easily the next step in chatbots, though right now it's pretty jury rigged together. It should work with all versions of GPT). Also updated with my new character format, creating room for the commands to include images. There is a lot more tokens, but I think it is completely worth it for the added images in chat, which can all be found through ratatatat74's work.

Update March 3 2024

The bug with "![](https" should now be resolved. There were some broken images making the bot act weird. This also had the added benefit of making the token count smaller.

Update March 15 2024

The bug with "![](https" has been worked on, and it may be solved for good. I had a lot of trouble recreating the possible conditions for it to return but only managed to get it to come back with seemingly random conditions. If you have trouble with it again please let me know exactly was has happened so I can get rid of this pesky bug. And remember that this will only work with OpenAI, if you are using JLLM or Kobold you'll probably get this bug constantly. If it pops up again and I work on it a few more times I may just have to get ride of the images. Won't be the end of the world if that happens though since it will reduce tokens and improve performance.

Update April 30 2024

I've reworked the images yet again! Hopefully the "![](https" bug is gone for good. If it returns for a lot of people that are using OpenAI then I'll just scrap the images since I've reworked it several times at this point. I've never had this problem with other bots that use this same image system, so it's very odd that it is popping up here.

Update August 24 2025

Fixed broken profile image.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
